name: policymesh
description: Autonomous Hedera procurement agent for decentralized infrastructure (Filecoin, Akash)

scripts.dev: npm run agent:dev & npm run web
scripts.setup: cp -n packages/agent/.env.example packages/agent/.env 2>/dev/null; cp -n packages/web/.env.example packages/web/.env.local 2>/dev/null; echo 'Env files ready — edit packages/agent/.env'
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:integration --workspace=@policymesh/agent
